revision.comment: Added the page to [[:Category:Module documentation pages]]
1 revision imported: impor5ting these because otherwise I might accidentally redirect them

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
